oneLine: Union with God — becoming by grace what God is by nature.
quote: God became man so that man might become God.
readingList: The Ladder of Divine Ascent — St. John Climacus

oneLine: Self-emptying — the voluntary laying down of power for the sake of love.
quote: He emptied himself, taking the form of a servant.
readingList: The Way of a Pilgrim — Anonymous Russian

oneLine: The eye of the soul — the faculty of direct spiritual perception, darkened by sin, illumined by prayer.
source: St. Maximus the Confessor, Centuries on Charity
quote: Pure prayer is the activity of the nous stripped of every thought.
readingList: The Philokalia Vol. II — St. Maximus the Confessor
The Mystical Theology of the Eastern Church — Vladimir Lossky

oneLine: Repentance as transformation — not guilt, but a turning of the whole person toward God.
quote: Repentance is not a moment but a way of life.
readingList: Beginning to Pray — Metropolitan Anthony Bloom
The Art of Prayer — Igumen Chariton of Valamo

oneLine: Spiritual discipline — the training of the body and soul as athlete trains for contest.
source: St. John Climacus, The Ladder of Divine Ascent
quote: The soul that loves God has no rest except in God.
readingList: The Ladder of Divine Ascent — St. John Climacus
The Sayings of the Desert Fathers — Various
Unseen Warfare — St. Nicodemus of the Holy Mountain
